en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains valid Swedish Social Insurance documentation in the Sweden Social Insurance Applicability Assessment questionnaire.

Sweden requires companies to participate in statutory labor (social) insurance schemes, managed mainly by the Swedish Social Insurance Agency, with certain responsibilities handled by the Ministry of Health and Social Affairs and enforced per the Social Insurance Code (2010:110).\n\n
Please upload your PAYE tax return receipt, issued within the last 30 days, from the Swedish Tax Agency.
